label: REVENANT
line: precise 1px hairline ink linework, miter joins
material: matte anodized aluminium and bare PCB
type: Aeonik display with IBM Plex Mono technical labels
register: 1960s Bell Labs technical manual crossed with a modern Anduril defense schematic — austere, clinical, exact
style: monochrome black ink line drawing on warm off-white paper #EDE9E5, a single brick-orange #E05A2B accent only, corner registration crosshairs, datum target triangles, dimension tolerances and an ISO-style title block; no colour anywhere except the one orange accent
